Causalidad NSW

```{r}
data(lalonde, package = "Matching")
head(lalonde)
```
```{r}
dim(lalonde)
```

```{r}
#install.packages("openxlsx")
library(openxlsx)

#write.xlsx(lalonde, file = "nsw.xlsx")

```

```{r}
names(lalonde)
```
```{r}
lalonde$u74 <- as.numeric(lalonde$re74==0)
lalonde$u75 <- as.numeric(lalonde$re75==0)
```


```{r}
vars <- c("age","educ","black","hisp","married","nodegr","re74","re75","re78", "u74", "u75")
group_var <- "treat"
table.obj <- tableone::CreateTableOne(vars = vars, strata = group_var, data =lalonde)
print(table.obj)
```

```{r}
lalonde_fit <- lm(re78 ~ ., data=lalonde)
```

```{r}
lalonde_fit
```

```{r}
lalonde_fit <- lm(re78 ~ treat + age + educ + I(educ^2) + I(educ^3) +factor(nodegr) + factor(black) + factor(hisp) + re74 + re75, data=lalonde)
```


```{r}
lalonde_fit
```
